assertionResults.title: Guest browse to login preserves create-listing destination

steps.action: Open home page, then navigate directly to seeded product detail /products/product-stable-001 as guest
steps.expected: A valid detail page loads with a visible For sale CTA
steps.observed: Argentina Home Jersey 2026 detail page loaded and displayed a visible For sale button

steps.expected: Redirect to /login with callbackUrl preserving the intended sell destination
Post-login returns to the intended sell/listing destination or auto-opens listing-entry UI
steps.observed: Returned to /products/product-stable-001 and the Create Listing modal auto-opened with quantity and ask-price fields plus Cancel/Next controls

evidence.consoleErrors: One browser error shown after login: 'Invalid or unexpected token'. Flow still completed and listing-entry UI opened.

assertionResults.finalUiState: Product detail page remained visible and a distinct Create Listing modal auto-opened with Quantity and Ask Price fields.

frictions.description: Home page did not expose product detail links in the initial mobile viewport snapshot, so I used current seeded data to navigate to a valid product detail route as allowed by the task.
frictions.resolution: Opened /products/product-stable-001 from the seeded stable IDs and continued the guest sell flow.

summary: VAL-CROSS-008 passed. Guest tapping For sale was redirected to login with a preserved sell callback, and after authenticating the app returned to /products/product-stable-001 with the Create Listing UI automatically opened rather than leaving the user on a plain detail page.
